input.content:
================================================================================
                    PROJECT MANAGEMENT TOOL
                        VERSION 2.0
                      RELEASE NOTES
================================================================================

Release Date: 2024

================================================================================
OVERVIEW
================================================================================

We are excited to announce the release of Project Management Tool v2.0! This 
major release brings significant enhancements to user experience, performance, 
and functionality. With over 50 new features and improvements, v2.0 represents 
a major step forward in project management capabilities.

================================================================================
NEW FEATURES
================================================================================

1. ADVANCED PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT
   - Multi-project portfolio dashboard for executive overview
   - Cross-project dependency tracking and visualization
   - Portfolio-level resource allocation and planning tools
   - Custom portfolio metrics and KPI tracking

2. AI-POWERED INSIGHTS & AUTOMATION
   - Intelligent task prioritization using machine learning
   - Predictive project timeline analysis
   - Automated risk detection and alerting
   - Smart resource recommendations based on historical data
   - Natural language processing for task creation and updates

3. ENHANCED COLLABORATION FEATURES
   - Real-time collaborative editing in project descriptions and tasks
   - Integrated video conferencing for team meetings
   - @mention notifications with threaded conversations
   - Rich media support (images, documents, video embeds)
   - Activity feed with advanced filtering and search

4. CUSTOM WORKFLOWS & AUTOMATION
   - Drag-and-drop workflow builder
   - Conditional automation rules (if/then/else logic)
   - Webhook support for third-party integrations
   - Approval chains and multi-stage reviews
   - Template library with pre-built workflows

5. ADVANCED REPORTING & ANALYTICS
   - Custom report builder with drag-and-drop interface
   - Interactive dashboards with real-time data
   - Burndown and velocity charts
   - Time tracking and resource utilization reports
   - Export to multiple formats (PDF, Excel, PowerPoint)
   - Scheduled report delivery via email

6. MOBILE APPLICATION
   - Native iOS and Android apps
   - Offline mode with automatic sync
   - Push notifications for task updates
   - Mobile-optimized interface for on-the-go management
   - Biometric authentication support

7. ENTERPRISE SECURITY FEATURES
   - SSO (Single Sign-On) integration (Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace)
   - Two-factor authentication (2FA)
   - Advanced permission controls with role-based access
   - Audit logs with detailed compliance reporting
   - Data encryption at rest and in transit
   - GDPR and HIPAA compliance certifications

8. TEMPLATE MARKETPLACE
   - Pre-built project templates for various industries
   - Community-contributed templates
   - Template customization and sharing
   - One-click project creation from templates

================================================================================
IMPROVEMENTS
================================================================================

1. PERFORMANCE & SCALABILITY
   - 3x faster dashboard load times
   - Optimized database queries for large datasets
   - Improved handling of projects with 10,000+ tasks
   - Better memory management for resource-heavy operations

2. USER INTERFACE & EXPERIENCE
   - Redesigned dashboard with improved layout and organization
   - Dark mode support across entire application
   - Customizable workspace layouts and widgets
   - Keyboard shortcuts for power users
   - Improved accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA compliance)
   - Mobile-responsive design improvements

3. TASK & PROJECT MANAGEMENT
   - Enhanced task dependencies with lag and lead time support
   - Improved Gantt chart with drag-and-drop timeline editing
   - Better subtask hierarchy and management
   - Quick task filtering and saved filter views
   - Inline editing for faster task updates
   - Bulk operations for multiple tasks

4. TEAM & RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
   - Improved team member capacity planning
   - Skill-based resource allocation
   - Time zone awareness for distributed teams
   - Workload balancing recommendations
   - Team availability calendar

5. INTEGRATION IMPROVEMENTS
   - Enhanced Slack integration with command support
   - Improved Microsoft Teams integration
   - Better Jira sync and data mapping
   - Native Google Drive and Dropbox integration
   - Improved webhook reliability and retry logic

6. SEARCH & FILTERING
   - Full-text search across all project data
   - Advanced filter builder with saved searches
   - Quick filters for common queries
   - Search history and suggestions
   - Smart search that understands context

7. NOTIFICATION SYSTEM
   - Improved notification delivery and reliability
   - Granular notification preferences
   - Digest notifications for reduced email clutter
   - Smart notification bundling
   - Rich notification cards with quick actions

8. DATA & IMPORT/EXPORT
   - Improved data import from legacy systems
   - CSV and Excel import with mapping preview
   - Enhanced data export options
   - API improvements for custom integrations
   - Better error handling and validation messages

================================================================================
BUG FIXES
================================================================================

1. CRITICAL FIXES
   - Fixed authentication timeout issue causing unexpected logouts
   - Resolved data loss bug when uploading large attachments
   - Fixed permission escalation vulnerability in admin panel
   - Corrected budget calculation error in portfolio view
   - Fixed task assignment notifications not being sent

2. MAJOR FIXES
   - Fixed Gantt chart display issues with long task names
   - Resolved duplicate task creation when clicking submit multiple times
   - Fixed date calculation errors in recurring tasks
   - Corrected resource allocation display on timeline
   - Fixed file attachment preview for certain file types
   - Resolved performance degradation with large number of comments

3. USER INTERFACE FIXES
   - Fixed button alignment issues in modal dialogs
   - Corrected text overflow in project descriptions
   - Fixed sorting inconsistency in task lists
   - Resolved dropdown menu positioning issues
   - Fixed date picker display on mobile devices
   - Corrected form validation error messages

4. INTEGRATION FIXES
   - Fixed Slack message formatting issues
   - Resolved missing data in email notifications
   - Fixed webhook retry logic for failed requests
   - Corrected API response pagination
   - Fixed calendar sync conflicts with Outlook

5. DATA & REPORTING FIXES
   - Fixed incorrect time tracking calculations
   - Resolved export file corruption issue
   - Fixed report filtering not applying correctly
   - Corrected chart data display for zero values
   - Fixed historical data retrieval in analytics

6. ACCOUNT & SECURITY FIXES
   - Fixed password reset token expiration handling
   - Resolved SSO login redirect loop
   - Fixed permission caching issues after role updates
   - Corrected audit log timestamps for compliance
   - Fixed CSRF token validation issues

================================================================================
DEPRECATIONS & BREAKING CHANGES
================================================================================

1. DEPRECATED FEATURES (will be removed in v3.0)
   - Legacy project view (use new dashboard instead)
   - Old Excel export format (use new format instead)
   - Basic authentication API (migrate to OAuth2)
   - Legacy notification email format (new template-based system)

2. BREAKING CHANGES
   - API v1 endpoints now require Authorization header
   - Project permission model has been refactored
   - Custom field data type validation is now stricter
   - Webhook payload structure has been updated

MIGRATION GUIDE:
Please refer to our migration guide at: https://docs.example.com/migrate-v2

================================================================================
SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
================================================================================

MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS:
- Browser: Chrome 90+, Firefox 88+, Safari 14+, Edge 90+
- Internet: 2 Mbps minimum connection
- OS: Windows 7+, macOS 10.12+, Linux (Ubuntu 16.04+)

RECOMMENDED REQUIREMENTS:
- Browser: Latest version of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge
- Internet: 10 Mbps or higher
- RAM: 8GB or more
- Processor: Multi-core processor (2.0 GHz or higher)

MOBILE REQUIREMENTS:
- iOS 12.0 or later
- Android 7.0 (API level 24) or later

================================================================================
KNOWN ISSUES
================================================================================

1. Large file uploads (>500MB) may timeout on slow connections
2. Real-time collaboration has occasional sync delays (< 5 seconds)
3. Dark mode is not yet available in the mobile app (coming in v2.1)
4. Some special characters in project names may not display correctly
5. Calendar integration with Apple Calendar is read-only in this release

WORKAROUNDS AND UPDATES:
For workarounds and updates on these issues, please visit:
https://support.example.com/known-issues-v2.0

================================================================================
INSTALLATION & UPGRADE
================================================================================

NEW INSTALLATION:
1. Download the installer from https://example.com/download
2. Follow the installation wizard
3. Create your account and start managing projects

UPGRADING FROM V1:
1. Back up your current data
2. Download the v2.0 installer
3. The upgrade wizard will automatically migrate your data
4. Review the migration guide for any breaking changes
5. Verify your projects and data after upgrade

For detailed installation instructions, visit:
https://docs.example.com/install-v2.0

================================================================================
SUPPORT & FEEDBACK
================================================================================

DOCUMENTATION:
https://docs.example.com
- Getting started guides
- Video tutorials
- API documentation
- Troubleshooting guides

COMMUNITY:
https://community.example.com
- User forums
- Knowledge base
- Feature requests
- Bug reports

SUPPORT CHANNELS:
- Email: support@example.com
- Live Chat: Available during business hours (9 AM - 6 PM EST)
- Phone: 1-800-EXAMPLE (for enterprise customers)

FEEDBACK & FEATURE REQUESTS:
We'd love to hear from you! Send your feedback to: feedback@example.com

================================================================================
ROADMAP & UPCOMING FEATURES
================================================================================

COMING IN V2.1 (Q2 2024):
- Dark mode for mobile apps
- Advanced budgeting features
- Expanded AI capabilities
- Additional integrations (Asana, Monday.com, Trello)

COMING IN V2.2 (Q3 2024):
- Dedicated time tracking application
- Advanced forecasting and capacity planning
- Custom application builder
- Enhanced compliance reporting

================================================================================
ACKNOWLEDGMENTS
================================================================================

We would like to thank all our users, customers, and community members for
their feedback, suggestions, and continued support. This release represents
months of development and refinement based on your invaluable input.

Special thanks to our beta testing group for their thorough testing and
detailed feedback that helped us create a more robust and user-friendly
product.

================================================================================
ABOUT THIS RELEASE
================================================================================

Version: 2.0
Build: 2024.01.001
Release Date: 2024
License: See LICENSE.txt for details
Copyright: 2024 Project Management Tool Inc. All rights reserved.

================================================================================

For additional information and resources, visit: https://example.com

Thank you for choosing Project Management Tool v2.0!

================================================================================
